chapter_title: About the Order of Eating What is next to One

hadith_entries.text:
360. Narrated Omar
ibn Abu-Salama
:‘Allah's
said to me: "Boy! Mention Allah's Name, eat ﷺ Messenger
with your right hand, and eat from what is next to you."
(Agreed upon)

361. Narrated Ibn Abbas: 'The Prophet said:
"Blessedness exists in the middle of the dish. Thus, eat from
its sides and do not eat from its center." (At-Termizi)
